reviews.review_title: Great many mode's to run a VR parkour
reviews.review_description:
19/04/2025 as Strider i like this parkour too, many modes like Endless, Chase and  Flow mode 
also Time Trails and a weekly cup with a scoreboard to see where you are in the top of the weekly and not to forget a active dev's team on the discord server so expect some new challenges to add also

reviews.review_title: The game is slowly becoming better
reviews.review_description:
A number of you have already played this game and seem to enjoy it, so here’s my take on it… it does play similarly to stride in the sense that it has time trials and has two endless modes, one of which is a normal endless mode and the other one is also endless mode but there’s an electric body constantly trying to tag you. 

Content wise it has less than stride but it’s unique in its own way to not be considered a stride clone even though gameplay wise, it sort of is… except you’re constantly going up instead of forward. 

My only complaint at this point is the physics (your movement) are really slippery. When you land on the ground and/or stop moving you’re slightly gliding on the ground a bit much.

I still enjoy how this game has a dark mode where you activate it and the environment suddenly becomes night time.

A great clone of Stride. The parkour mechanics are almost as good, but ledge grabbing works differently — you have to grab at the right moment instead of just holding a button.

If the game continues to develop in this direction, it could become exactly what Stride fans have been waiting for (instead of games about cats).

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the support! Your feedback motivates us to keep improving the game and adding new content.

reviews.review_description: This is my current new obsession! A good parkour game with great flow once you get locked in. Would be great to maybe have the option to have the grapple be activated by the trigger so you don’t accidentally activate the grapple when reaching for your gun. Being dragged to an unrecoverable position at the end of a run is infuriating and disheartening. Also it seems that in endless mode the higher you climb the higher chance for the terrain to start generating in wonky ways. Like background buildings spawning directly in front of you blocking your view and turrets spawning inside of obstacles or sometimes in background buildings. I hope this gets fixed this would be a lot more fun if my runs didn’t get cut short by procedural generation errors or what have you.

After the hand hold update I really enjoy this game. I do think the players gravity overshoots a lot of the time though when you land on a Surface you tend to keep sliding like your own ice. My only real complaint right now is there's no seated play. If you could add seated play I would give you five stars. I think this would be a great game for multiplayer as well nothing too punitive just something for people to get together and jump around and have fun in. Points could be scored for longevity in the game on multiplayer or something like that. I hope you keep developing on this idea and keep updating the game. I've updated my review to 5 stars. Seated play was added and the sliding on ice feeling was fixed. 👍

reviews.review_title: Fresh new racing parkour movement game
reviews.review_description:
Excited to see this one grow. If you've played stride, burst, etc it feels familiar but far more vertical. The time trials are fun, and seeing other people's replays to race against is cool. But endless mode and the weekly cup is where it's at. There's 3 different themes, I like the colorful original one but the dark mode is easier on your eyes. I've left some feedback on their discord of minor polish things but there's a really fun addictive game here it you love running, jumping, climbing, wall running, grappling, shooting, sliding on rails, and being launched with telekinesis. Oh one really cool thing is seeing the level animate in - like platforms lower down from the sky. 

The important thing is this game is by a reputable studio that also made Omega Pilot and Exocars, they have a history of supporting their games, so this is only the beginning. The developers are listening to feedback and the Quest version is already greatly improved from what the original psvr version was. There's a solid game here to climb leaderboards on, and I'm a massive fan of vr parkour.

developer_response.body: Thank you for such detailed feedback! We will continue improving the game and adding new content.

reviews.review_description:
This game is great, the movement is actually really smooth, the visuals are nice and the render distance is not three to ft like it is in stride, the endless mode feels very refreshing that it is not extremely repetitive like stride's, and everything is well. Though,I feel like it would be nice to incorporate some sort of sliding like stride did. 
But if you are on the fence about getting this, it is well with the money spent.

I'm new to VR, so I usually struggle with VR games. But this time I actually feel comfortable and even do pretty well. I spent about 30 minutes in the tutorial, but now I can run on walls. It's really fun, even though I still can't make it into the top 100 on the leaderboard.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! We’re really happy to hear that you’re enjoying the game, especially if you’re new to VR.
It’s great to know the game feels comfortable for you and that you’re having fun with it. We hope you keep improving your personal bests and moving up the leaderboard.
Thanks for playing and for sharing your experience.

reviews.review_description: Was gonna rate it lower since I pre ordered and bought those game , then it released and I had to re purchase it like my pre order didn't exist. But that's personal stuff that shouldn't effect the rating of the games value so I gave it 4 stars because it's really fun and is an awesome game. 1 thing needs to be addressed. PLEASE MAKE IT AN OPTION TO CLICK THE LEDT JOYSTICK TO RUN INSTEAD OF ARM FLAPPING TO RUN. THAT WOULD MAKE THIS GAME 5 STARS IMMEDIATELY.  PLEASE ADD THIS!

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for the review. We’re actively working on updates based on feedback and ideas from our players.
We will definitely add the running option you suggested. We’re planning to release an update in the next couple of days.

Update
Thank you for your feedback! We’ve added your request to the game. Now you can run in whichever way feels most comfortable for you.
There are now three ways to run:
• click the left stick
• push both sticks forward (left and right)
• move your arms to run

Enjoy the game and thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description: fun and immersive game that makes climbing and flying feel smooth and exciting. The controls are easy to learn and the environments look great nice and clean visuals

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for your review.
We have many ideas for developing the game and will continue releasing updates in the near future. Your feedback gives us motivation to keep working on the game.
